What is the addressable PR-AUC and how d.answer:
According to [2], the addressable PR-AUC for every model family (including 
the GRU sequence challenger) is 0.382, while the pooled PR-AUC is 0.301.

The difference between the addressable and pooled PR-AUC is +0.081.
